lint.details: 0 errors, 24 pre-existing warnings in jobs/queue.ts and worker.ts

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'Port Management' or 'Runtime Configuration' convention section documenting which files must be updated when ports change (docker-compose.yml, index.ts, queue.ts, .env.example, services.yaml, skill files).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-runtime-manifest-and-port-normalization feature required port changes but AGENTS.md had no documented convention about which files need updating when ports change.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing conventions section documenting global state cleanup patterns (save/restore globalThis.fetch in afterEach) for tests that mock global state.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-full-test-suite-isolation implemented a sensible pattern for globalThis.fetch cleanup that is not documented in AGENTS.md testing section.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove references to .factory/library/architecture.md, .factory/library/contracts.md, .factory/library/environment.md, and .factory/services.yaml since these files do not exist in this mission context.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-database-bootstrap-and-admin-auth worker encountered ENOENT errors when trying to read these files referenced by the backend-worker skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how workers should handle pre-existing validator failures. The current procedure says to 'run validators before handoff' but doesn't specify acceptable results when pre-existing failures exist vs failures caused by the feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-runtime-manifest-and-port-normalization worker ran validators that failed but declared success without clarifying which errors were pre-existing vs caused by changes.
